sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103299" key="teta/sqhn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετάσθην</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τέτᾰτο</orth>, <sense id="n103299.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τείνω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετάχᾰται</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τάσσω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετεύχᾰται</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετεύχετον</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τεύχω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
